title: draba arctica subsp. ostenfeldii
intro: Draba arctica subsp. ostenfeldii, also known as Ostenfeld's draba, is a subspecies of the Draba arctica plant, which belongs to the mustard family and is a type of flowering plant found in Arctic and alpine regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Draba arctica subsp. ostenfeldii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
